creator: merouman@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

The port www/rt44 depends on the port p5-Email-Address which is deprecated on 31th december 2018. To my knowledge, the replacement port is p5-Email-Adress-XS.

Sincerely,


p5-Email-Address-1.909: Tag: expiration_date Value: 2018-12-31
p5-Email-Address-1.909: Tag: deprecated Value: Deprecated by upstream
